title: salvia japonica var. fortunei
intro: Salvia japonica var. fortunei, also known as Fortune's Sage, is a variety of the Salvia japonica plant, a type of flowering perennial native to East Asia. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Fortune's Sage include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, improve cognitive function, and support immune system function. Fortune's Sage can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
